retrieved_result: Crispy Skin Slow Roasted Pork Shoulder SHARE THIS RECIPEOn keto, I’m always looking for different ways to get fatty meats into my diet that will taste great and keep my wallet (and stomach) full. Yesterday, I picked up this 8 pound roast for just under $16. Yep, that’s under $2 a pound – and it’ll feed an entire family for a few days! Pu
